idx_one_primary_plan_per_student.name: idx_one_primary_plan_per_student
idx_one_primary_plan_per_student.where: "four_year_plans"."is_primary" = TRUE AND "four_year_plans"."is_template" = FALSE AND "four_year_plans"."student_id" IS NOT NULL

frozen_consistency.name: frozen_consistency
frozen_consistency.value: ("users"."account_status" = 'frozen' AND "users"."freeze_reason" IS NOT NULL AND "users"."frozen_at" IS NOT NULL) OR ("users"."account_status" <> 'frozen' AND "users"."freeze_reason" IS NULL AND "users"."frozen_at" IS NULL)
